items.title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
items.description: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

items.title: Senator Lindsey Graham has died after a brief illness, his office says
items.description: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, was 71.

items.title: ‘Almost unlimited’: Execs says AI demand remains strong even as enterprises move to ‘valuemaxxing’
items.description: AI-related chip stocks have been volatile amid a debate over AI demand and spending.

items.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
items.description: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

items.title: The volatile AI trade marched higher, but oil kept Wall Street on edge last week
items.description: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
items.description: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.

items.title: Trump Accounts: Who is eligible, how $1,000 deposits work and how to open one
items.description: Trump Accounts officially launched in July, introducing a new tax-deferred investing option for children. Here are the key features.

items.title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
items.description: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.

items.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
items.description: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
items.description: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

items.title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
items.description: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.

items.title: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak
items.description: Return to office mandates and a decline in remote work have companies looking more closely at the quality of life in the place where they establish offices.

items.title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
items.description: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.

items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.description: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
items.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

items.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
items.description: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

items.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
items.description: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
items.description: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

items.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
items.description: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

items.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
items.description: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.
